description: v15 targeted expansion from v13 1M using active 12D hole-search failed subspaces. New rows are training-only and are generated from a mix of active failed-subspace jitter, high-amplitude S3/A3/B2/A1 couplings, far/bridge coupled-full coverage, sparse controls, and orthogonal-style controls.

candidate_selection.note: Generate twice the requested candidate count, compute normalized 12D nearest-neighbor distance to the v13 train-eligible parent dataset, then keep mostly far-NN candidates plus bridge/anchor cases. This prevents v15 from becoming only boundary extremes.

active_failed_subspace_jitter.note: Jitter around physical 12D cluster centers found by active hole search. These are not literal active probe rows.

space_filling.note: Per-regime Latin-hypercube candidates before parent-NN far/bridge selection.

relative_angles.note: Angle balancing is explicit for the vector pairs that active search found problematic: A3-S3 and B2-S3, with A1-S3 retained.

c1_balanced.note: C1 is monitored but not made dominant because the present defocus geometry limits intrinsic C1 sensitivity.

coverage_metrics_to_track.decision_rule: Promote v15 only if it reduces active sparse-tail failures and benchmark blind/stress errors without worsening dense A3/S3/A1 high-amplitude failures.

decision_note.purpose: Test whether adding failed-region coverage around active 12D hole-search clusters reduces v13 coverage-limited errors.
decision_note.resource_note: Use mini-batch training and chunked evaluation/prediction. Back up the generated v15 CSV to Google Drive before training.
decision_note.promotion_rule: Promote only if v15 improves weighted score, blind/stress metrics, residual-vs-NN sparse tails, and S3/A3/A1 active-failure diagnostics without easy-target regression.
